ab: lawkah simu kwara ga.pata’aring ta la.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.

ab: tuli’ tubun tunux!
en: A: Please stand up! Salute!

ab: lawkah su pasaba’ biru.
en: B: Hello.

ab: tala’ung.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: lawkah simu kwara ga. sawni ga pasaba’ay simu ni pasaba biru sawun nanu kamayan lalu Tayan ku mutu ta nani’un hiya.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的泰雅語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Thai.

ab: ba’un su mung kayi pasaba biru ga?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: pasaba biru, ini mu ba’iy mung. kayan lawziy aw?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ini mu pungi. musa balayi kahanayang tikay aw?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: katayux ti hani! galu kung lamapu lawziy.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: balayi balay lnpu mamu ki.
en: It’s very well read.

ab: lapagaw ta lawziy. karahu tikay hanayang mamu.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: yamalux tikay. ka sanguwa.
en: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: agan ku biru mamu.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: awu, pasaba biru.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: agan ku inpit mamu.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: pasaba biru, yamangiya kung maras inpit la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: agan ku i’ing mamu.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: pasaba biru, yamangiya kung maras i’ing la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kasiyuk i’ing ki bih su gamalu miru.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: kasiyuki kung i’ing aw?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: pahangi ta la.
en: Class is over.

ab: masi runi ku pinkaba’an ta la, pakatayux ta suru na pahangi’an lawziy.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
